case_title: DANVERS M BOARDMAN, TRUSTEE/ BOARDMAN FAMILY TRUST vs. JOANNE KOEHLER DBA SOUTH CITY TOW et al

docket_entries.description: O/C, SETTLED PER PLTF. TO DEPT. #1, JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOANNE KOEHLER DBA SOUTH CITY TOW PETER KOEHLER PKS, INC. A CORP. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 230 FLORIDA ST. & 241 ALABAMA ST. $19,984.80 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,984.80, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WILL NOT SEEK A WRIT UNTIL ON OR BEFORE 12/1/94; PLTF. WAIVES TREBLE OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, ATTORNEY FEES, COSTS, AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
